name: morning-briefing-pro
description: Premium morning briefing: calendar + email + reminders + weather + overnight messages, delivered as conversational narrative tuned for voice.
core_description: User-invocable: 'morning briefing', 'morning rundown', 'kick off my morning'. Delegate to core via `work`; the skill's SKILL.md drives a multi-step gather + synthesize flow. Output is conversational narrative written to results/proactive-<ts>.txt. Optional `depth` arg: brief / standard / detailed.
